title: more wepons and stuff
description: well this mod adds some more wepons
body:
![more wepons and stuff](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a18dd5047576aaa70d83a35acb4a396b8c6f8fb.png)
- ## TOOL
this adds tool like
- a lava type sword and a hammer that can block and a picaxe that mines real fast
- ## structure
- this mod makes you find these structures all arond your minecraft world
-  like a tower with the hammer and a ruind god like hand temple and a small castle and it adds the lava sword
- ## info
- and models made in blockbench and mod made in MCrator
- bdw first mod :D
- hope you like this
